visa_types.name: Business Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
For social visa (tourism or family/friends visit), the following are the basic documents are required:
- Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1R9pZ1De2kLhgolnsQ19y1/91d751a1144550e6dd42dae4625b6c8e/visa-aplication-form-14a.pdf)
( duly completed and signed by the applicant (Form 14 is also downloadable from:
www.ica.gov.sg (https://www.ica.gov.sg/)
- 1Recent passport sized colour photograph with white background, it should not be more than 6 months old.
- Clear
of passport (pages showing personal details and the validity as well as endorsement of valid visas to other countries, photocopy of any residence issued in the last 5 years, if any). Please ensure that the passport is valid for at least 6 months from the intended date of departure to Singapore and contains at least one blank page.
- Travel itinerary (Applicants are advised to confirm hotel and flight reservation only after the visa has been approved), advised to apply for an entry visa within 30 days prior to the date of arrival in Singapore (not more).
- A letter of Invitation (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf) which must be issued by a Singapore citizen with mentioning his/her (NRIC number full name +full address +phone number Copy of Singaporean Id), ( invitation letter required in case of family/friends visit).
- Original Certificate of the employment( HR Letter): specifying the date of recruitment, salary level annually, and purpose of travel ( Original and stamped)
- For freelancers, they can make a simple written declaration.
- For non-employed (e.g. housewife, student, baby, retired, etc), no letter needed.
- Official translation of the documents are required if they are not in the English Language.
- Visa processing fee EGP 355 per application (non-refundable).
- The applicant and the local contact may be required to furnish additional documents and information whenever necessary.
- Incomplete/illegible forms and /or documents submitted may result in the application being rejected or the processing delayed.
- Every application for a visa will be considered on its own merits.
- Possession of a visa does not guarantee entry into Singapore. Visitors must also meet entry requirements such as holding a valid passport, sufficient funds for the period of stay in Singapore and complete travel itinerary.
- All documents must be submitted on A4 size paper only.
- Applications without a
Letter of Invitation (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf)
without a mentioned of NRIC number will not be accepted.
- Saudi Diplomatic passport will not require a visa to enter Singapore.
- All refugee travel documents, Palestinian Authority passport and Kuwaiti -Article 17 passports, must be sent to the embassy for approval before applying.
- For foreign applicants, must have valid residence (for non-touristic purposes) covering the duration of the tripe to Singapore with the ability to return to their country of residency.
- If the applicants will stay in Singapore more than 14 days must provide a detailed itinerary or LOI.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Business Visa ]
Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in EGP is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- All fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time for a visa application is approximately (3-5) working days   excluding the day of submission and the Egypt & Singapore week-ends holidays. However, some applications may take longer if further verification and evaluation are required.
For more information please refer to this link (https://www.ica.gov.sg/visitor/visitor_entryvisa)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Find out whether, depending on your citizenship, country of long-term residence, and the duration and reasons for your stay, you need a visa to enter Singapore. The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure you have all the supporting documents.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Find out whether, depending on your citizenship, country of long-term residence, and the duration and reasons for your stay, you need a visa to enter Singapore. The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure you have all the supporting documents. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business Visa ]
Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in EGP is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
For social visa (tourism or family/friends visit), the following are the basic documents are required:
- Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1R9pZ1De2kLhgolnsQ19y1/91d751a1144550e6dd42dae4625b6c8e/visa-aplication-form-14a.pdf)
( duly completed and signed by the applicant (Form 14 is also downloadable from:
www.ica.gov.sg (https://www.ica.gov.sg/)
- 1Recent passport sized colour photograph with white background, it should not be more than 6 months old.
- Clear
of passport (pages showing personal details and the validity as well as endorsement of valid visas to other countries, photocopy of any residence issued in the last 5 years, if any). Please ensure that the passport is valid for at least 6 months from the intended date of departure to Singapore and contains at least one blank page.
- Travel itinerary (Applicants are advised to confirm hotel and flight reservation only after the visa has been approved), advised to apply for an entry visa within 30 days prior to the date of arrival in Singapore (not more).
- A letter of Invitation (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf) which must be issued by a Singapore citizen with mentioning his/her (NRIC number full name +full address +phone number Copy of Singaporean Id), ( invitation letter required in case of family/friends visit).
- Original Certificate of the employment( HR Letter): specifying the date of recruitment, salary level annually, and purpose of travel ( Original and stamped)
- For freelancers, they can make a simple written declaration.
- For non-employed (e.g. housewife, student, baby, retired, etc), no letter needed.
- Official translation of the documents are required if they are not in the English Language.
- Visa processing fee EGP 355 per application (non-refundable).
- The applicant and the local contact may be required to furnish additional documents and information whenever necessary.
- Incomplete/illegible forms and /or documents submitted may result in the application being rejected or the processing delayed.
- Every application for a visa will be considered on its own merits.
- Possession of a visa does not guarantee entry into Singapore. Visitors must also meet entry requirements such as holding a valid passport, sufficient funds for the period of stay in Singapore and complete travel itinerary.
- All documents must be submitted on A4 size paper only.
- Applications without a
Letter of Invitation (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf)
without a mentioned of NRIC number will not be accepted.
- Saudi Diplomatic passport will not require a visa to enter Singapore.
- All refugee travel documents, Palestinian Authority passport and Kuwaiti -Article 17 passports, must be sent to the embassy for approval before applying.
- For foreign applicants, must have valid residence (for non-touristic purposes) covering the duration of the tripe to Singapore with the ability to return to their country of residency.
- If the applicants will stay in Singapore more than 14 days must provide a detailed itinerary or LOI.

## Photo Specifications
- Taken within the last 6 months
- Clear and in focus, 35mm wide by 45mm high, without any borders
- In colour taken against a plain white background without shadows
- Avoid white headgear and plain white clothing (headgear worn in accordance with religious or racial customs is acceptable but must not hide any facial features)
- Full face with the upper shoulders visible, facing forward with eyes open
- Hair must not cover the eyebrows or the eyes
- Even exposure (must not be taken under direct lighting)
- Spectacle frames must not cover part of the eyes
- Spectacle lenses must not reflect or glare.
Dos and Don'ts

[Table:  Business Visa ]

Important notes:
- Your photograph must meet ICA’s requirements. Failure to meet these requirements can delay your application or result in its rejection.
- Your photograph must not be altered or enhanced in any way. This includes the modification of facial features and/or the usage of photo editing software.
For further details on photo guidelines you may visit the ICA website:
Click Here (https://www.ica.gov.sg/)

## Processing Time
The processing time for a visa application is approximately (3-5) working days   excluding the day of submission and the Egypt & Singapore week-ends holidays. However, some applications may take longer if further verification and evaluation are required.
For more information please refer to this link (https://www.ica.gov.sg/visitor/visitor_entryvisa)

## Download Forms

[Table:  Business Visa ]
